control.text: Measure that maintains and/or modifies risk.

governance.text: System by which the achievement of objectives is directed and controlled at the highest level.

process.text: Set of interrelated or interacting activities that use inputs to deliver an intended result.

procedure.text: Specified way to carry out an activity or a process.

policy.text: Intentions and direction of an organization, as formally expressed by its top management.

compliance.text: Meeting all the organization's compliance obligations.

standard.text: Document, established by consensus and approved by a recognized body, that provides rules, guidelines or characteristics.

guideline.text: Recommendation that is not mandatory but represents accepted good practice.

asset.text: Item, thing or entity that has potential or actual value to an organization.

stakeholder.text: Person or organization that can affect, be affected by, or perceive itself to be affected by a decision or activity.

incident.text: Event that has caused or has the potential to cause injury, ill-health or loss.

capability.text: Ability to apply knowledge and skills to achieve intended results.

record.text: Document stating results achieved or providing evidence of activities performed.

service.text: Output of an organization with at least one activity necessarily performed between the organization and the customer.

data.text: Reinterpretable representation of information in a formalized manner suitable for communication, interpretation or processing.

information.text: Knowledge concerning objects, such as facts, events, things, processes or ideas, including concepts, that within a certain context has a particular meaning.

system.text: Set of interrelated or interacting elements.

framework.text: Set of components providing foundations and organizational arrangements for designing, implementing, monitoring, reviewing and continually improving processes throughout the organization.

obligation.text: Requirement that an organization is expected, or has chosen, to comply with.
